title: T-082 — NonConformance event contract for Technical PO/TO triggers
prompt:
# T-082 — NonConformance event contract for Technical PO/TO triggers

PRD: docs/prd/03-TECHNICAL-PRD.md §0, §5.1A, §9.4, §11.2
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Shared NCR request event schema used by Technical PO and TO actual variance triggers.

This task does not implement 09-QUALITY investigation workflow. It creates the contract, schema validator and Technical outbox helper so PO/TO triggers can request NCR consistently. If 09-QUALITY tables/events already exist, map to that canonical contract and document the mapping. PO and TO triggers remain Technical-side producers; Quality may be consumer/owner.

## Implementation contract
See `## Goal` + scope_files + acceptance_criteria below; preserve prototype parity, server-action semantics, RLS/org-scoping, and module red-lines listed in `## Risk red lines`.

## Files
- apps/web/events/contracts/non-conformance-requested.ts [create]
- apps/web/lib/technical/non-conformance-outbox.ts [create]
- tests/events/non-conformance-requested.contract.test.ts [create]
- tests/integration/technical/non-conformance-idempotency.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given T-076 emits PO price/spec/allergen variance, then payload validates with source_event_name=po.receipt_actual_recorded and reason_codes from the PO variance set.
2. Given T-077 emits TO shelf-life/location/temperature variance, then payload validates with source_event_name=to.transfer_actual_recorded and reason_codes from the TO variance set.
3. Given the same idempotency_key is emitted twice, then one outbox/NCR request exists and duplicate attempt returns existing reference.
4. Given 09-QUALITY contract exists, then this task maps to it without creating a divergent Technical-only payload.
5. Given D365 is disabled, then NCR request still emits from local PO/TO events without D365 identifiers.

## Test strategy
- RED contract tests with valid and invalid PO/TO payload fixtures.
- RED idempotency test around outbox helper.
- Run: pnpm vitest run tests/events/non-conformance-requested.contract.test.ts tests/integration/technical/non-conformance-idempotency.test.ts

## Risk red lines
- Do not implement Quality NCR workflow screens.
- Do not mutate master data while emitting NCR requests.
- Do not require D365 identifiers in the contract.
- FG is canonical; FA is legacy alias only — do not introduce FA-* identifiers in new schemas, code, labels, tests.
- D365 is optional integration; never use D365 IDs as hard FKs — d365_item_id is TEXT soft reference only.
- Released BOM/factory_spec edits clone-on-write a new version; never mutate an approved/released row in place.
- Shared BOM SSOT is canonical — Technical, NPD, Planning, Production, Warehouse and Finance read the same bom_headers/lines/co_products tables.
